productDisplayName: Jockey ELANCE Men Bikini White Brief 1005
description: Style Note Revel in the comfort of soft fabric with this white Elance string bikini brief from jockey. The superior fabric provides breathable comfort, while the cut offers easy leg movement. The printed label allows abrasion free comfort and the double layered fly construction offers maximum support Product Details Minimum front coverage with full back coverage Double layered contoured pouch design for optimum comfort New ultra soft waistband provides super soft, smooth and comfortable grip Material and Care 100% premium combed cotton Machine wash delicate at 40 degrees with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach, iron or dry clean Tumble dry low
